memories: The user's girlfriend's name is Clara.
The user has a good singing voice and enjoys performing for close friends and family.
The user has a weekly routine of cooking a large breakfast on Sundays.
User maintains a small succulent collection on the living room bookshelf, with each plant labeled by its Latin name.

User spent two weeks solo in Eastern Europe last spring, photographing brutalist architecture in former Soviet bloc countries.
The user works as a lighting technician in the television industry.
The user's girlfriend loves Italian food, especially pasta dishes.

User converted the apartment balcony into a compact woodworking studio for crafting small furniture pieces. The space smells of cedar shavings and contains a carefully organized collection of hand tools.
The user and their girlfriend, Clara, are celebrating their 3-year anniversary.
query: I want to plan a perfect anniversary night at home for my girlfriend. Can you give me a few ideas to make it really special and personal for her?
